Meaning.Vi: Chuyến bay/xe đưa đón; thoi (trong dệt); phi thuyền con
Meaning.En: A vehicle that makes regular trips between two places, especially between an airport and a city; a small spacecraft designed to travel between Earth and orbit; a tool used in weaving to carry the weft thread through the warp.
Meaning.Example: The hotel provides a free shuttle to the airport every 30 minutes.

Situation.Vi: Đưa đón khách giữa sân bay và trung tâm thành phố.
Situation.En: Transporting passengers between an airport and a city center.

Situation.Vi: Phi thuyền con Space Shuttle của NASA từng bay vào quỹ đạo.
Situation.En: NASA's Space Shuttle was a reusable spacecraft used for missions in low Earth orbit.

Meaning.Vi: Đưa đón (bằng xe/thuyền/người) thường xuyên; đưa vào quỹ đạo bằng phi thuyền con
Meaning.En: To transport people or goods repeatedly between two locations; to launch or return a spacecraft using a space shuttle.
Meaning.Example: The company shuttles employees between the office and the parking lot every morning.

Situation.Vi: Xe đưa đón liên tục chạy giữa hai địa điểm trong một khu công nghiệp.
Situation.En: A shuttle bus continuously runs between two locations within an industrial park.

Situation.Vi: Phi hành gia được đưa lên quỹ đạo bằng phi thuyền con.
Situation.En: Astronauts were shuttled into orbit using the space shuttle.
